name: Full Pizza Flow — Bear base | Tomato sauce | Cheese + Mushroom
description:
End-to-end pizza-making flow: bear base + tomato sauce + cheese/mushroom toppings.
Device: ZA222LJGVX (2400×1080 landscape). Automation: Maestro MCP + ADB.

**RESULT: FAIL — blocked at Step 2**

The tutorial hand widget (a floating guide overlay) permanently covers the top-left
fridge position (element 17 [406,318][549,461]) and intercepts all drag gestures.
Flutter's gesture arena gives priority to the tutorial hand's recognizer over the
ingredient's drag recognizer, regardless of touch start coordinate, gesture speed,
or drag direction. 3/4 ingredients placed; game requires all 4 to enable checkmark.

**Known working baseline**: test_pizza_heart_tomato (Run 3, 2026-06-14) completed
all 13 steps — that run likely generated a fridge layout with no item at top-left.

statusTrace: Bug: Flutter gesture arena prioritises tutorial hand (element 18 [177,331][521,589]) over ingredient drag (element 17 [406,318][549,461]). All automation approaches exhausted across two test sessions.

testStage.description:
End-to-end pizza-making flow: bear base + tomato sauce + cheese/mushroom toppings.
Device: ZA222LJGVX (2400×1080 landscape). Automation: Maestro MCP + ADB.

**RESULT: FAIL — blocked at Step 2**

The tutorial hand widget (a floating guide overlay) permanently covers the top-left
fridge position (element 17 [406,318][549,461]) and intercepts all drag gestures.
Flutter's gesture arena gives priority to the tutorial hand's recognizer over the
ingredient's drag recognizer, regardless of touch start coordinate, gesture speed,
or drag direction. 3/4 ingredients placed; game requires all 4 to enable checkmark.

**Known working baseline**: test_pizza_heart_tomato (Run 3, 2026-06-14) completed
all 13 steps — that run likely generated a fridge layout with no item at top-left.
testStage.statusMessage: FAIL — Step 2 blocked: tutorial hand prevents top-left fridge item drag.
testStage.statusTrace: Bug: Flutter gesture arena prioritises tutorial hand (element 18 [177,331][521,589]) over ingredient drag (element 17 [406,318][549,461]). All automation approaches exhausted across two test sessions.

steps.name: [V1.5] Tap Play — transitions to ingredient screen
Step 2 — Select Fridge Ingredients
steps.statusMessage: Tutorial hand widget (element 18, bounds [177,331][521,589]) intercepts all drag gestures from the top-left fridge position (element 17, bounds [406,318][549,461]). 3 of 4 items placed successfully; slot 3 remains empty. Checkmark stays gray — game requires ALL visible fridge items to proceed.
steps.statusTrace: Attempts made: swipe duration 200ms/500ms/600ms/700ms/800ms/1200ms/1500ms/3000ms; start coords 20%36%, 22%28%, 22%29%, 23%30%, 14%43% (tutorial hand tap first); ADB input swipe; ADB draganddrop; drag order variations (last-first). All failed.

steps.name: [V2.5] Item 1 (top-left, zucchini) — drag FAILED
steps.statusMessage: BLOCKED: Tutorial hand element 18 [177,331][521,589] covers the drag start area of element 17 [406,318][549,461]. Flutter gesture arena gives priority to the tutorial hand's recognizer; ingredient drag is never initiated regardless of start coordinate, duration, or approach used.

steps.name: [V2.6] Only 3/4 tray slots filled — checkmark remains gray
steps.statusMessage: Game requires ALL visible fridge items before checkmark enables.

steps.name: Step 4 — Add Dough Ingredients to Bowl
Step 6 — Select Pizza Shape (bear)
